title: Overgrown Flowery Hotbar
description: The sleek and adorably cottagecore Hotbar offshoot of Overgrown Flowery GUI!
body:
![Overgrown Flowery Hotbar Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/coUTm32c/images/33b8cd255fa4d736754f9fd572c475f209b21e4d.png)
__Become a bit closer to living out your cottagecore dreams using this GUI overhaul!__

This resource pack only changes the hot-bar, and can be used (mostly) with other GUI resource packs, simply make sure you've loaded it on top.

For the full experience check out the original [Overgrown Flowery GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/overgrown-flowery-gui).

Mod support will attempt to stay up-to-date with the main pack where relevant.
